description: Marketplace payments pipeline with BOLA guard, SETNX cart lock, payment split idempotency, LIFO saga compensation, and vault-ref-only payout. T609 MarketplaceCheckoutGateway validates BOLA at ORDER 1, SETNX cart lock ORDER 2, OCC inventory ORDER 3-4, storeDocument BEFORE CheckoutReserved (DNA-8).

n1.label: ValidateCheckoutRequest
n1.description: Validate checkout request: BOLA (cart.buyerTenantId === ALS.tenantId), CF-16-1 SETNX cart lock ORDER 2, required fields, tenant scope

n2.label: RetrievePaymentPatterns
n2.description: RAG retrieval of marketplace payment patterns: CART-LOCK-SETNX-001, PAYMENT-SPLIT-IDEMPOTENCY-001, LIFO-SAGA-COMPENSATION-001, NON-REPUDIATION-AUDIT-001

n3.label: DecomposePaymentPlan
n3.description: Decompose marketplace payment pipeline into T609 checkout gateway, T610 payment splitter, T611 escrow controller, T612 payout writer sub-tasks

n4.label: GenerateCheckoutGateway
n4.description: AI generates T609 MarketplaceCheckoutGateway: BOLA ORDER 1 cart.buyerTenantId === ALS.tenantId (CF-16-1); SETNX cart lock ORDER 2 with FREEDOM checkout_lock_ttl_ms; OCC inventory reservation ORDER 3-4; storeDocument(audit) BEFORE CheckoutReserved DNA-8. T610: SETNX(hash(tenantId+cartId+totalAmountCents)) unconditional return; platformFeeBps from FREEDOM; PII scrub; append-only nonRepudiationAudit hash chain; escrow BEFORE MarketplaceOrderConfirmed. T611: LIFO [REFUND_PAYMENT, RESTORE_INVENTORY] CF-16-3; dispute=updateDocument only; escrow_auto_release_days from FREEDOM. T612: SETNX payout-lock; payoutVaultRef only (CF-16-5).

n5.label: ValidateNamedChecks
n5.description: Validate named checks: BOLA ORDER 1 present, SETNX hash(tenantId+cartId+total) not cartId-alone, LIFO array order REFUND before RESTORE, no deleteDocument on escrow/audit, payoutVaultRef only

n6.label: ScorePaymentImplementation
n6.description: Score implementation: BOLA compliance, split idempotency correctness, LIFO order, append-only NRA audit, vault-ref-only payout, DNA-8 store-before-enqueue

n7.label: RouteOnScore
n7.description: Route to feedback (score >= 0.85) or iterate (score < 0.85 AND cycles_remaining > 0)

n8.label: StoreFeedback
n8.description: DPO triple: chosen=CART-LOCK-SETNX-001+PAYMENT-SPLIT-IDEMPOTENCY-001+LIFO-SAGA-COMPENSATION-001 CF-16-3+NON-REPUDIATION-AUDIT-001+vault-ref-only. rejected=no-BOLA-check OR cartId-only-idempotency OR FIFO-compensation OR deleteDocument-on-dispute OR bank-details-in-payout. discriminatingConstraint: SF-1 BOLA ORDER 1, SF-2 hash(tenantId+cartId+total) SETNX, SF-3 LIFO [REFUND,RESTORE], SF-4 append-only NRA no deleteDocument, SF-5 payoutVaultRef only. curriculumTier=1.
n8.discriminatingConstraint: no-BOLA ORDER 1 OR cartId-only SETNX OR FIFO-compensation OR deleteDocument-on-escrow OR bank-details-in-payout receives score=0 and triggers n3 re-iteration. Correct: BOLA first, hash idempotency key, LIFO array, append-only audit, vault-ref-only payout, all DNA-8 gates.
